title: Ubumfihlo
intro: I-Helexa yakhelwe ukuthi idatha yakho ihlale nawe. Leli khasi lichaza, ngokuphelele, ukuthi yini egcinwa kuphi nangasiphi isizathu. Lifushane ngoba kuncane okumele kudalulwe.

summary.title: Ngamafuphi
summary.noCookies: Awekho amakhukhi. Akukho ukuhlaziywa kokusetshenziswa (analytics). Azikho izilandeleli. Akukho ukukhangisa.
summary.localHistory: Umlando wengxoxo yakho ugcinwa esipheqululini sakho kuphela. Awukaze uthunyelwe emaseva ethu noma ugcinwe kuwo ngale kwesikhathi sokwakha impendulo.
summary.noAnonId: Izivakashi ezingaziwa azithathelwa izigxivizo zeminwe zedijithali, azakhelwa iphrofayela futhi azihlonzwa.

local.title: Okugcinwa esipheqululini sakho
local.intro: Konke okungezansi kuhlala kudivayisi yakho, kukhona kuphela ukuze umkhiqizo usebenze, futhi kungasuswa noma nini ngokusula idatha yale sayithi esipheqululini sakho.
local.item1: Umlando wengxoxo, amaphrojekthi nezinhlaka zemilayezo — isithembiso esiyinhloko somkhiqizo ukuthi lokhu akukaze kuphume esipheqululini sakho.
local.item4: Uma ungena ngemvume: ithokheni yeseshini yakho, futhi — kuphela uma uyivumela ngokusobala — ukhiye we-API wokuxoxa usuka kule divayisi.
local.item5: Isibali semilayezo esingahlonzi muntu esiphoqelela umkhawulo wokusetshenziswa kwamahhala.

account.title: Uma udala i-akhawunti
account.intro: Ama-akhawunti akhona ukuze kulinganiswe ukusetshenziswa futhi kuvinjelwe ukuhlukunyezwa, hhayi ukwakha amaphrofayela. Ohlangothini lweseva sigcina:
account.item1: Ikheli lakho le-imeyili (lokungena, ukuqinisekisa nokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi) ne-hash yephasiwedi enosawoti (salted hash) — hhayi iphasiwedi uqobo lwayo.
account.item2: Ukulinganiswa kokusetshenziswa: inani lamathokheni ngesicelo ngasinye, elidingekayo ukuphoqelela izabelomali nokukhokhela abaphathi abaphethe izicelo zakho. Okuqukethwe kwemibuzo nezimpendulo akugcinwa.
account.item3: Ngesikhathi sokubhalisa kuphela, isignali yesiphequluli yesikhathi esisodwa (i-hash yesigxivizo somunwe) esetshenziselwa ukuthola ukuhlukunyezwa kwama-akhawunti amaningi ezingeni lamahhala. Ayisetshenziselwa ukulandelela, ayikaze ibalwe ekuphequluleni okungaziwa, futhi ayinandima eyidlalayo ngemva kokubhalisa.

infra.title: Ingqalasizinda
infra.body: Ukwakhiwa kwezimpendulo (inference) kwenzeka kumahadiwe abaphathi abazimele base-Yurophu ngaphansi komthetho wase-Yurophu. Iwebhusayithi yomphakathi imelwe yi-Cloudflare, engase ibeke ikhukhi yayo yezokuphepha edingeka ngokuqinile (isibonelo, ukuvimbela amabhothi) esingayifundi futhi esingayisebenzisi.

rights.title: Amalungelo akho
rights.body: Ngaphansi kwe-GDPR ungacela ukufinyelela, ukulungiswa, noma ukususwa kwedatha ye-akhawunti yakho noma nini, futhi ungafaka isikhalazo esiphathimandleni sakho sokwengamela. Ukususa idatha yesiphequluli sakho kususa umlando wengxoxo yakho; ukususa i-akhawunti yakho kususa konke esikugcine ohlangothini lweseva.
